response.text:
I see a jitter/eye analysis screen centered on Ref 1.

- Main plot: an eye diagram for Meas 1 with a fairly open eye at about 2.5 Gb/s.
- Measurement table: Meas 1 is “Jitter Summary” with values including:
  - DR ≈ 2.5008 Gb/s
  - PL(UI) ≈ 40
  - TIE(o) ≈ -39.045 zs mean
  - TJ@ ≈ 54.07 ps
  - RJ ≈ 1.6804 ps
- Additional analysis panes:
  - TIE histogram
  - TIE spectrum
  - Bathtub curve
  - Waveform view
- Right-side measurement badges still show:
  - Meas 4: Rise Time, μ ≈ 145.4 ps
  - Meas 5: Fall Time, μ ≈ 220.4 ps
  - Meas 6: Amplitude, μ ≈ 744.8 mV
  - Meas 7: Peak-to-Peak, μ ≈ 1.104 V
  - Meas 8: Peak-to-Peak, μ ≈ 1.104 V

So the screenshot itself still shows Meas 4–8 present on the right sidebar, despite the delete commands having been sent.
